articles.title: Heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states for Monday, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states for Monday, list released
The IMD has issued heavy rainfall and heatwave warning for several states for Monday (May 18). Heavy rainfall is very likely over Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Assam, Meghalaya, Kerala, Puducherry, Karnataka, West Bengal, Sikkim and Tamil Nadu. Heatwave is very likely over Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi, Madhya Pradesh, Punjab, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh and Maharashtra.
